title: Set permanent admin email with automatic role assignment

requirements.text: Store the permanent admin email 'niranjanniranjan88464@gmail.com' as a constant in the backend main actor

quotes:
Set this email as permanent admin:

niranjanniranjan88464@gmail.com

acceptanceCriteria: The email 'niranjanniranjan88464@gmail.com' is stored as a constant or stable variable in backend/main.mo
The stored email is used for admin role comparison

requirements.text: Automatically assign role = 'admin' when the logged-in user's email matches 'niranjanniranjan88464@gmail.com'

quotes: If logged in email matches this, automatically assign role = "admin".

acceptanceCriteria: When a user profile is created or retrieved, check if their email matches the permanent admin email
If the email matches, automatically set the user's role to 'admin'
The admin role assignment persists across sessions
The isCallerAdmin function returns true for the permanent admin email

requirements.text: Update the admin authentication flow to recognize the permanent admin email without requiring manual role assignment
acceptanceCriteria: The permanent admin can access all admin panels (AdminPanel, TournamentAdminPage, DepositAdminPage) immediately after login
No manual role assignment or token setup is required for the permanent admin
Admin session validation succeeds for the permanent admin email

constraints: Do not modify frontend authentication components (useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts)
Preserve existing admin role validation logic for other admin users
Maintain backward compatibility with current admin session management
nonGoals: Creating an admin email management interface
Changing the frontend admin guard components
Modifying the Internet Identity authentication flow
